_comment: Copy this configuration to your VS Code MCP settings or Claude Desktop config
_instructions: 2. Replace 'your-burp-api-key-here' with your actual Burp Suite API key
3. Update the nanobrowser path if your installation is different
4. Ensure Burp Suite is running on port 9876 with REST API enabled (for security MCP)
5. Ensure Nanobrowser extension is running on port 9222 (for Claude MCP)
6. For Claude Desktop: Copy to ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS)
7. For VS Code/Cline: Copy to .vscode/mcp.json or Cline settings
